## PiPipe.handle() method

Registers an HTTP route on the underlying `uWebSockets.js` app.

**Signature:**

```typescript
handle(method: HttpMethod, path: string, handler: HttpHandler): this;
```

## Parameters

method

[HttpMethod](./pi-ws.httpmethod.md)


</td><td>

HTTP method name as expected by `uWebSockets.js`<!-- -->.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

path


</td><td>

string


</td><td>

Route path pattern.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

handler


</td><td>

[HttpHandler](./pi-ws.httphandler.md)


</td><td>

Route callback.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this

The current `PiPipe` instance.

## Remarks

Routes added here are installed after the built-in `/healthz` route and before the final catch-all 404 handler.
